2026-04-24T18:31:57.4059298Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4059864Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4060303Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4060691Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4061016Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4061256Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4061425Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4061610Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4061794Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4062024Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-24T18:31:57.4062232Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
